basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Young Professional, Lab Cum Filed Attendant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR- Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI), Regional Station, Katrain
basic_details.post_name: Young Professional-I (YP-I) & Lab cum Field Attendant
basic_details.short_information: IARI Katrain is recruiting 02 temporary positions under ongoing research projects. Walk-in Date: 15 July 2026.

important_dates.venue: Office of ICAR-IARI, Regional Station, Katrain, Kullu Valley (H.P.)

qualification.details: Post Essential Qualifications Desirable Young Professional-I (YP-I) B.Sc. degree in Agriculture/Horticulture Working experience in the field of vegetable science Lab cum Field Attendant 10+2 in Agriculture/Horticulture/Science/Arts/Commerce Experience in laboratory work and physical fitness for field work

vacancy_details.Project Name & Termination Date: PPV&FRA – DUS testing of Radish and Carrot (31.03.2027)
BIRAC – Conversion of doubled haploids of broccoli (11.02.2027)

vacancy_details.Desirable: Working experience in the field of vegetable science
Experience in laboratory work and physical fitness for field work

post_wise_breakdown.project_name_termination_date: PPV&FRA – DUS testing of Radish and Carrot (31.03.2027)
BIRAC – Conversion of doubled haploids of broccoli (11.02.2027)

post_wise_breakdown.desirable: Working experience in the field of vegetable science
Experience in laboratory work and physical fitness for field work

selection_process: Candidates must attend Walk-in Interview on 15 July 2026 at 10:00 AM. Bring prescribed application form

and original certificates for verification. Only candidates with essential qualifications will be interviewed. Selected candidates will work on a purely contractual basis co-terminus with the project.
how_to_apply: Download and fill the prescribed application format.
Submit the application along with self-attested documents and photograph at the time of walk-in interview on 15.07.2026.
Email the relative declaration (if applicable) to [email protected] by 07.07.2026.
important_instructions: Positions are purely temporary and contractual, co-terminus with the project. No claim for regular appointment or absorption in ICAR/IARI. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. Selected candidates must produce all original documents and medical certificate at the time of joining.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Candidates must attend Walk-in Interview on 15 July 2026 at 10:00 AM. Bring prescribed application form, self-attested documents, recent passport-size photograph, and original certificates for verification. Only candidates with essential qualifications will be interviewed. Selected candidates will work on a purely contractual basis co-terminus with the project.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download and fill the prescribed application format. Submit the application along with self-attested documents and photograph at the time of walk-in interview on 15.07.2026. Email the relative declaration (if applicable) to [email protected] by 07.07.2026.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: Positions are purely temporary and contractual, co-terminus with the project. No claim for regular appointment or absorption in ICAR/IARI. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. Selected candidates must produce all original documents and medical certificate at the time of joining.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for ICAR IARI Katrain Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 15 July 2026 at 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in IARI Katrain Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 02 temporary posts (1 Young Professional-I and 1 Lab cum Field Attendant).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Young Professional-I at IARI Katrain?
faq.answer: Consolidated emoluments are Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for Lab cum Field Attendant at IARI Katrain?
Q5. What is the age limit for Young Professional-I at IARI Katrain?
faq.answer: Age limit is 21-45 years with relaxation as per rules.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for ICAR IARI Katrain Walk-in 2026?
faq.answer: Fill the prescribed application form and attend the walk-in interview on 15 July 2026 with all documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the stipend for Lab cum Field Attendant at IARI Katrain?
faq.answer: Consolidated pay is Rs. 15,000/- per month.
